title: [Nyessem, Testing Approach]
description: Glittering lines of gemstones run the length of the room where the walls connect to the ceiling.  Hidden light sources behind the gems cast a rainbow of thin light beams across the floor.  On the far side of the room, the white stone wall ripples and wavers, creating the illusion of a large portal.  Set atop this wall in the room's center is a large rune-etched diamond that gently pulsates.
